assessment.shadow_recovery: NOT ACHIEVED — weight mismatch is fundamental
assessment.structural_echo: MARGINAL: max mean enrichment = 1.13 — barely above noise
assessment.scaling_law: FLAT: mean enrichment slope = -0.0055 — no scaling trend
assessment.honest_summary: The mock-shadow relationship is mediated by the xi operator, which maps weight 1/2 harmonic Maass forms to weight 3/2 cusp forms. Our database contains only weight-2 newforms. The fingerprint matching therefore cannot recover the actual shadow — it can only detect whether mock theta functions share distributional properties (mod-p, growth, sign patterns) with any weight-2 forms. This is a test of STRUCTURAL SIMILARITY across weight spaces, not a test of the shadow map itself. Results: fingerprint discrimination is present, meaning the mock theta functions do look like a subset of the weight-2 landscape from the fingerprint perspective.
